ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "website_size" TEXT /* Size as displayed on the website */,
  "eu_size" TEXT /* EU size equivalent */,
  "ita_size" TEXT /* Italian size equivalent */,
  "usa_size" TEXT /* USA size equivalent */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., Junior, Adult, Plus) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "breast_circ_cm" REAL /* Breast circumference in centimeters */,
  "breast_circ_inch" REAL /* Breast circumference in inches */,
  "pelvis_cm" REAL /* Pelvis circumference in centimeters */,
  "pelvis_inch" REAL /* Pelvis circumference in inches */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist circumference in centimeters */,
  "waist_inch" REAL /* Waist circumference in inches */,
  "bust_length_cm" REAL /* Bust length in centimeters (total body swimwear) */,
  "bust_length_inch" REAL /* Bust length in inches (total body swimwear) */,
  "hip_circ_cm" REAL /* Hip circumference in centimeters */,
  "hip_circ_inch" REAL /* Hip circumference in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price_eur" REAL /* Price in Euros */,
  "price_usd" REAL /* Price in US Dollars */,
  "price_ita" REAL /* Price in Italian Euros */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Bikini, One-Piece) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to the product video */,
  "product_features" TEXT /* Features of the product (e.g., adjustable straps, push-up) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_material FOREIGN KEY ("material") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_color FOREIGN KEY ("color") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand FOREIGN KEY ("brand") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-size combination */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock for this size */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the product-size combination is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency for transactions */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_status" TEXT /* Loyalty status of the customer (e.g., Bronze, Silver, Gold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer profile */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "size_preference" TEXT /* Preferred size for swimwear */,
  "style_preference" TEXT /* Preferred style (e.g., Bikini, One-Piece) */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "favorite_products" TEXT /* Favorite products of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_profiles_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount paid for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used (e.g., Standard, Express) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "gift_wrapping" INTEGER /* Whether the product is gift wrapped or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the recipient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the recipient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the recipient */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the recipient */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the recipient */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the recipient */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the recipient */,
  "shipping_instructions" TEXT /* Shipping instructions for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_addresses_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was processed */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "return_requests" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return request */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the return was requested */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return request (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount to be refunded */,
  "return_shipping_label" TEXT /* Return shipping label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_return_requests_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_return_requests_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support ticket */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the ticket */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., Open, In Progress, Closed) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the ticket was last updated */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the ticket (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support message */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the support ticket */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender (customer or support agent) */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "message_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "message_type" TEXT /* Type of the message (e.g., Customer, Agent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_messages_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES support_tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Bikini, One-Piece) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hex code of the color */,
  "rgb_code" TEXT /* RGB code of the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "new_table" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "recommended_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended product */,
  "recommendation_type" TEXT /* Type of recommendation (e.g., frequently_bought_together, also_viewed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_new_table_recommended_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_new_table_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
